results.successor_evidence: Murray Bass Jr P.E.+RPLS is named partner at Bass & Welsh per LinkedIn. The 'Jr' in Bass's name suggests there may be a Murray Bass Sr (deceased or retired); BUT he is the current PARTNER (with Welsh) = two-partner firm. 6-10 employees / $1M-$5M revenue per ProView. Multi-discipline civil + marine + survey.
results.team_page_evidence: ProView + RocketReach + LinkedIn confirm two-partner firm (Bass + Welsh); 6-10 employees; $1M-$5M revenue; multi-discipline (civil engineering, marine engineering, marine surveys, municipal surveys). Specialty marine engineering = Corpus Christi coastal/marine niche.
results.demote_reason: Two-partner firm (Bass + Welsh) = succession depth implicit. Mid-size ($1M-$5M rev). Welsh is the other principal/partner = co-owner candidate, not pure coasting-solo profile. Marine engineering specialty = highly differentiated niche.
coasting_tells: Mid-size ($1M-$5M rev) two-partner firm in Corpus Christi — coastal/marine specialty niche.
Murray Bass Jr 'Jr' suffix = generational; potential succession further up the tree.

results.successor_evidence: moonsurveying.com (search summary): JMA has 'three field crews with a full-time staff of ten that includes three Registered Professional Land Surveyors and three survey technicians.' THREE active RPLS at the firm. The 1987 founding by Jeff Moon (who took over from Wally Tuttle's Arrowhead Surveying) is established multi-generation. DEMOTE A→B: 3 RPLS = depth of credential succession.
results.team_page_evidence: moonsurveying.com (search summary): 3 field crews, 10 staff including 3 RPLS + 3 survey techs. Founded 1987 (Jeff Moon) from acquired Arrowhead Surveying (1960s). Conroe TX. Full-service.
results.demote_reason: Three active RPLS at firm = succession depth. NOTE: TBPELS join showed Seth Malone Gibson as senior RPLS at this firm (firm 10112200) + Jeffrey Moon as junior — but actual firm reporting shows Jeff Moon owns it (he bought Arrowhead Surveying / Wally Tuttle 1987). The TBPELS join is misleading because Seth Gibson's RPLS happens to also be attached to firm 10112200 in addition to his own firm 10057100 — possibly Seth Gibson was a pre-acquisition RPLS at Arrowhead Surveying.

results.exclusion_reason: Firm name suggests energy-services operator rather than pure surveying. Two RPLS at firm: Michael D. McGuinness (1978 senior) + Ryan Garrett Weber (2021 junior). 43-year gap = explicit younger successor in place; PLUS firm name suggests not pure surveying. DEMOTE.
results.demote_reason: Ryan Weber (2021 RPLS) is the explicit younger successor — internal-buy-in. Plus firm name '3B Energy Services' is energy operator, not pure surveying-services provider.
